things.name: Whale Shark Snorkelling (Bay of Ghoubbet)
things.description: Swim with whale sharks November-January in the Gulf of Aden

things.name: Lake Assal
things.description: Hypersaline crater lake - Africa's lowest point at 155m below sea level with salt flats

things.name: Day Forest National Park (Foret du Day)
things.description: Last remaining juniper forest in the Horn of Africa with endemic birds

things.name: Ardoukoba Volcano
things.description: Walk the 1978 lava flows of the youngest volcano in Africa

things.name: Marche Central (Central Market)
things.description: Spice market with frankincense, myrrh and qat (khat) chewing leaves

things.name: Khor Ambado Beach
things.description: Best beach near the city with mangroves and flamingos at the fringing reef

things.name: Palace du Peuple Cultural Centre
things.description: Djiboutian cultural performances and temporary exhibitions

things.name: Harar Day Trip (Ethiopia)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage walled city 5 hours away - hyena feeding at night

things.name: Obock & Moucha Island
things.description: Historical Ottoman outpost and excellent diving in the Gulf of Tadjoura

things.name: Skudahkharis (Lamb & Rice Plate)
things.description: Djiboutian national dish of slow-cooked lamb on spiced rice with tomato sauce
